description_long: This is a modern, stylized axe with a striking black and red color scheme. The handle is robust and slightly curved, featuring segmented grip sections for enhanced handling and control. The blade is double-edged with a geometric, angular design, and both edges are outlined in vivid red, giving it a futuristic or high-visibility appearance. The head of the axe is large and features a prominent beard and poll, with open spaces in the blade for reduced weight and visual impact. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the blade and a synthetic or composite material for the handle. This axe would stand out in an urban environment, possibly as a tool for emergency, display, or themed activities.
description: A modern, black and red axe with a segmented, curved handle and a double-edged, angular blade featuring open spaces and high-visibility red outlines.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and handle, with red edges visible along the blade.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the side, highlighting the full length of the curved handle and the geometric, double-edged blade with open spaces and red outlines.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the bottom, displaying the pointed blade tips and the symmetry of the blade edges.
description_view_3: The opposite side view of the axe, mirroring view 1, with the same handle curvature and blade design visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, segmented composite handle with a rectangular cross-section and ergonomic grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, angular blade with open geometric sections, prominent beard, and red high-visibility outlines.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or integrated with the handle.
